title: New Evangelion sceneFinal found in Eva Q pachinko trailer
display_title: New Evangelion sceneFinal found in Eva Q pachinko trailer
wikitext:
[]: New Evangelion scene(Final?) found in Eva Q pachinko trailer Post by unitM » Mon May 04, 2015 1:12 pm Hi guys. An Eva pachinko machine trailer popped up on my Twitter feed. I decided what the hell and watched it. The trailer was littered with flashy merchandise and with scenes already found in Q. One scene stood out though. It appears to be(judging by the sleeve) Misato clenching someone's hand. The animation is less than a second long but you can see that she is clearly gripping the hand. The background of the scene(the dark red setting) doesn't seem like something outside of Q, where the NERV HQ was an industrial red complex. Edit the Tweet in mention: https://twitter.com/evageeks/status/595058440403177472 the video in mention http://youtu.be/LUlYP8DmVB8 (the scene is at 00:30)

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Mon May 04, 2015 1:24 pm That scene is from 1.0, when Misato holds Shinji's hand and takes him down to Lilith's chamber. It's nothing new - in fact, it's ancient!

[]: Post by unitM » Mon May 04, 2015 1:31 pm UrsusArctos wrote: That scene is from 1.0, when Misato holds Shinji's hand and takes him down to Lilith's chamber. It's nothing new - in fact, it's ancient!

[]: Post by Guy Nacks » Mon May 04, 2015 1:39 pm Another false alarm. Lock 'er up, boys.

[]: Post by unitM » Mon May 04, 2015 1:55 pm sticks the lock key up his butt
